'''âj-f-dh''' ('''kajafadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerograph|xerograph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerograph|xerograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajafadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafadh|thijafadh]] || [[word:jijafadh|jijafadh]] || [[word:shijafadh|shijafadh]] || [[word:kijafadh|kijafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafadh|thuthujafadh]] || [[word:jujujafadh|jujujafadh]] || [[word:shushujafadh|shushujafadh]] || [[word:kukujafadh|kukujafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafadh|thujafadh]] || [[word:jujafadh|jujafadh]] || [[word:shujafadh|shujafadh]] || [[word:kujafadh|kujafadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujafadh|thujafadh]] || [[word:jujafadh|jujafadh]] || [[word:shujafadh|shujafadh]] || [[word:kujafadh|kujafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejafadh|thejafadh]] || [[word:jejafadh|jejafadh]] || [[word:shejafadh|shejafadh]] || [[word:kejafadh|kejafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojafadh|thothojafadh]] || [[word:jojojafadh|jojojafadh]] || [[word:shoshojafadh|shoshojafadh]] || [[word:kokojafadh|kokojafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafadh|thojafadh]] || [[word:jojafadh|jojafadh]] || [[word:shojafadh|shojafadh]] || [[word:kojafadh|kojafadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafadh|thojafadh]] || [[word:jojafadh|jojafadh]] || [[word:shojafadh|shojafadh]] || [[word:kojafadh|kojafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjafadh|thĂŠjafadh]] || [[word:jĂŠjafadh|jĂŠjafadh]] || [[word:shĂŠjafadh|shĂŠjafadh]] || [[word:kĂŠjafadh|kĂŠjafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafadh|thathajafadh]] || [[word:jajajafadh|jajajafadh]] || [[word:shashajafadh|shashajafadh]] || [[word:kakajafadh|kakajafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafadh|thajafadh]] || [[word:jajafadh|jajafadh]] || [[word:shajafadh|shajafadh]] || [[word:kajafadh|kajafadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajafadh|thajafadh]] || [[word:jajafadh|jajafadh]] || [[word:shajafadh|shajafadh]] || [[word:kajafadh|kajafadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajafadh|shajafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajafadh|goshajafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajafadh|gokishajafadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajafadhnĂŒ|shajafadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajafadhnknĂŒ|goshajafadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafadhnĂŒ|gokishajafadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajafadhshĂ«|shajafadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkshĂ«|goshajafadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajafadhshĂ«|gokishajafadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafadhro|shajafadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkro|goshajafadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafadhro|gokishajafadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafadhmu|shajafadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkmu|goshajafadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafadhmu|gokishajafadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajafadhsher|shajafadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajafadhnksher|goshajafadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajafadhsher|gokishajafadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajafadhng|shajafadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkng|goshajafadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajafadhng|gokishajafadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajafadhya|shajafadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkya|goshajafadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajafadhya|gokishajafadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajafadhyam|shajafadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkyam|goshajafadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajafadhyam|gokishajafadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafadhnĂŒshĂ«|shajafadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajafadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajafadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafadhnĂŒro|shajafadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafadhnknĂŒro|goshajafadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafadhnĂŒro|gokishajafadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafadhnĂŒmu|shajafadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafadhnknĂŒmu|goshajafadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafadhnĂŒmu|gokishajafadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shajafadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajafadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajafadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafadhshĂ«ro|shajafadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkshĂ«ro|goshajafadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafadhshĂ«ro|gokishajafadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafadhshĂ«mu|shajafadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkshĂ«mu|goshajafadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafadhshĂ«mu|gokishajafadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafadhronĂŒ|shajafadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkronĂŒ|goshajafadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafadhronĂŒ|gokishajafadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafadhroshĂ«|shajafadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkroshĂ«|goshajafadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafadhroshĂ«|gokishajafadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajafadhromu|shajafadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkromu|goshajafadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajafadhromu|gokishajafadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajafadhmunĂŒ|shajafadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkmunĂŒ|goshajafadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajafadhmunĂŒ|gokishajafadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajafadhmushĂ«|shajafadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkmushĂ«|goshajafadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajafadhmushĂ«|gokishajafadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajafadhmuro|shajafadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajafadhnkmuro|goshajafadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajafadhmuro|gokishajafadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
